name: Call-Of-Doodie
currentFocus: Session 53 is shipping the compounding post-queue refinement pass: browser-local Studio events now carry sync metadata and mirror through a new `sync-studio-events` path, Run History trust ops surfaces report queue/sync health, and Roast Director runtime coverage is now complete.
